name: Dazai Osamu
description:
"Я так боюсь красоты,

Что когда рядом ты

У меня задрожали коленки."

RAMONA - Коленки

Oops! It seems that the great "Demon Prodigy" has one weakness after all. And that's you! <3

A little bit about the bot:

Well, PM!Dazai, but I didn't delve into the description of the backstory or anything else... I also didn't specify the presence of abilities to save tokens (and my own nerves), as bots usually don't use them anyway.

The bot's description also briefly mentioned the following characters: Mori, Alice, and Chuuya. Alice is portrayed as Mori's adopted daughter, heh.

Dazai lives in a shipping container, so you can probably take him home like a stray kitten, Idk.

He also wears braces because I said so <//3

From the author (okay, I'm surprised, someone is actually reading this):

Well, here's another silly fluffy bot, hehehe. Initially, when my friend sent me this song, I really wanted to make a mini comic with a scene like the one in the first message, but I'm too lazy🥀🥀🥀

I'm genuinely surprised by the activity under the previous bot (at least for me, it's a big activity), thank you guys <//3

So, yes, I felt the need to create this Dazai just because I can. The second message was also inspired by a mini comic I saw on Pinterest, but unfortunately, I don't think I can find the author right now.

Since I don't have a 'themed' drawing for the bot this time, I'll just put a couple of my chibi soukoku here. No one minds, right?:

I could probably just leave a link to my channel on Telegram or TikTok, but I don't think it makes sense if 99% of my content is in Russian🥀

Anyway, enjoy the bot! <33
creator: KamiRivar
